tfg.clientmessage.spatialioblocked.claim: Spatial IO blocked: Region contains chunks claimed by another team
tfg.disabled_portal: Portal magic seems to be blocked by an unknown force, try reaching another dimension by going down or up
tfg.emi.bacon_requirement: Bacon - The Raw Pork must be smoked first
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.angle:
Decreases the §lHorizontal Angle§r for throwing your §lDouble Hooks§r by 5°, down to 5°°.
Only accessible with a §lDouble Hook§r installed.
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.doublehook: Removes the §lSecondary Hook§r from your Grappling Hook
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.forcefield:
Disables the §lForce Field§r Upgrade, returning the original Field Generator.
Only works if you use the same type of Field Generator as before.
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.gravity.0:
Returns the Hook's §lGravity§r back to 100% (0 -> 1).
The Gravitation Engine Unit will be returned.
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.gravity.0.5:
Returns the Hook's §lGravity§r back to 100% (0.5 -> 1).
The empty bucket will be filled with the Helium you used
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.magnet:
Disables the §lMagnet§r Upgrade, returning the original Magnetic Ingot.
Only works if you use the same type of Magnetic Ingot as before.
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.maxlen: Decreases §lMax Length§r by 20, down to 20. (Jute Rope is Returned).
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.motor:
Disables the §lMotor§r Upgrade, returning the original motor.
Only works if you use the same type of Motor as before.
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.smart_motor: Disables the §lSmart Motor§r Upgrade, can be removed with the Motor already uninstalled. Returns the Basic Electronic Circuit
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.sticky: Disables the §lSticky§r Upgrade, returning the Sticky Resin
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.throwspeed:
Resets the §lThrow Speed§r of the hook back to normal, returning the original Piston.
Only works if you use the same type of Piston as before.
tfg.grapplemod.downgrades.vertical_throw: Decreases the §lVertical Throwing Angle§r of the hook by 5°, down to 0°.
tfg.grapplemod.repair: Repair recipe, keeps your upgrades. §lNEVER combine two grapples or you'll lose ALL your upgrades!§r
tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.angle:
Increases the §lHorizontal Angle§r for throwing your §lDouble Hooks§r by 5°, up to 90°.
Only accessible with a §lDouble Hook§r installed.
tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.doublehook: Adds a §lSecondary Hook§r to your Grappling Hook
tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.forcefield.ev:
Enables the §lForce Field§r Upgrade, repelling you from nearby blocks while Grappling.
§lRepel Force§r set to 2.5
tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.forcefield.hv:

tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.forcefield.uv:

tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.forcefield.zpm:

tfg.grapplemod.upgrades.magnet.magnetic_:
Enables the §lMagnet§r Upgrade, causing the hook itself to attach to nearby blocks.
§lAttraction Radius§r set to 1.25
